textByHash.fff39b887305ab66b7e326d0a5ed86a13bebf4fc: Hello. Would you like to visit the Library Historical Archive? We've recently opened the archive to visitors.
textByHash.90225b4aec35c3accb01122e931b00c36f9591c4: I am Archeio, guardian of the Library Historical Archive. I grant both visitors and staff access to the archive.
textByHash.cd063fe56da9eaad82ab9bfa0e0aa1ee06c83ba2: Would you like me to teleport you there now?
textByHash.f90627b9a84c5188330faf5c0979892b4b8e4b82: The Library Historical Archive stores our most ancient and precious texts. You can find out much more about Great Kourend and our key historical events there.
